name: rank-tracker-backend
description: Local Rank Tracker Backend — DataForSEO Edition

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const {existsSync}=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const path=require('path'); const skip = process.env.SKIP_FRONTEND_POSTINSTALL==='1' || process.env.SKIP_FRONTEND_BUILD==='1' || process.env.CI==='true'; const feDir = path.resolve(__dirname,'..','frontend'); if (skip) { console.log('[postinstall] Skipping frontend install/build (SKIP_FRONTEND_POSTINSTALL/SKIP_FRONTEND_BUILD/CI).'); process.exit(0); } if (!existsSync(path.join(feDir,'package.json'))) { console.log('[postinstall] No frontend/package.json found; skipping.'); process.exit(0); } const cmd = 'npm'; const run = (args) => spawnSync(cmd,args,{cwd:feDir,stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); console.log('[postinstall] Installing frontend deps...'); let r = run(['ci']); if (r.status!==0) process.exit(r.status||1); console.log('[postinstall] Building frontend...'); r = run(['run','build']); process.exit(r.status||0);"
